features.featureTitle: Review the existing portfolio site and clarify what specific changes the user wants. In the meantime, make the following visible polish improvements: (1) Increase the hero section headline font size for greater visual impact on desktop. (2) Ensure all navigation links scroll precisely to their target sections without offset issues. (3) Add a real phone number placeholder '+91 XXXXX XXXXX' in the Contact section if not already present. (4) Make the portfolio grid items slightly taller for better visual balance. (5) Ensure the footer copyright year reads 2025.
